name: kagome_3x3_observables_B2

ground_state.comment: B_2 GS lives in S=3/2 quadruplet — DIFFERENT from A_1, A_2, B_1 sectors which all have S=1/2 doublets at L=3 PBC.  Each spatial irrep hosts the lowest-S state available within the irrep × spin tensor product.

notes: Final N=27 sector observable to complete the 4-irrep finite-size flow table.  B_2 took 106 iters to converge (most of any sector), required max_iters=300 instead of 200.  Notable finding: at L=3 the four 1D irreps host ground states in two different total-spin sectors: S=1/2 in A_1/A_2/B_1 and S=3/2 in B_2.  This sector-vs-spin coupling is a finite-size feature; in the bulk all sectors should be sector-symmetry-protected and S-degenerate.
